other_observers: Joe Roller, Cheri Orwig; Joey Kellner found the birds earlier in the day and was seen for several days by many others.
specific_location: Swimming back and forth along the dam on the north side of Chatfield Reservoir
description: Both birds were the same size, which was a long body, with short neck and a very small bill, which was help upwards most of the time. There were no other birds hanging out with these two. They had gray neck both without any patterning. One had a darker gray neck than the other. They both had a little white near the lower flanks. The white in the face went to/slightly above the eye. They both had black backs.Behaviors: Swimming and diving close to the damCall: Didn’t hear it callPlumage: 1 Adult and 1 Juvenile
